data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Product-only purchases', but the evidence does not confirm that such purchases can be made independently of service bookings. The linked use case primarily discusses bundled offerings of services with products, and there is no evidence indicating that a customer can purchase products without also booking a service. This indicates a gap in the requirement as the evidence does not support the existence of a mechanism for product-only purchases.
gaps: No evidence confirming the ability to make product-only purchases.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
